text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A wedding is going to be held at Tracen Academy
today, and the bride herself is a graduate. The
wedding planner, however, is of course...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming today, everybody! Welcome to
the wedding!

text_block_list.name: Graduate Guests
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the smell of the turf really takes me back!
But I wonder why we're all lined up here?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's because... We've got a race planned for
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bam!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Today's race is the Wedding Stakes! It's a
1,400-meter turf race! And every single runner's
flown out of the gate at once!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The bride's in the lead! This distance is sure to be
nostalgic as it's the same length as her debut
race! As she sprints down it now, she enters a new
stage in her life!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Ahaha... I remember these sights... so well!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That was a wonderful entrance for all the key
players! But we're not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, please take a look at that huge screen
over there!
choice_data_list: Does she mean that display? Oh!

text_block_list.text: Ready, and... Congratulations on your marriage!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text: That banner! No way, those people... Can it be?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate's Fans
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all the memories and joy you've
given us! Now it's your turn to be happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
All your fans got together to congratulate you,
Big Sis! Hehe. Look how happy they are!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
We're gonna start the reception off with a mini
performance from the bride and her friends!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's turn up the party with some songs! Come on,
everyone! Sing along, dance, and enjoy
yourselves!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking the center position today! Okay,
everyone, are you ready?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the wedding Haru Urara planned just
keeps bringing joy to its many attendees...

text_block_list.name: Emcee
text_block_list.text: Right, next up, the bride's going to read her vows!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hoo boy! This is the grand finale! I wonder if my
sister's nervous.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all very much for coming today. I'm
overjoyed that I get to start a new chapter of my
life here, where I chased after my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
There's somebody I'd like to introduce to you all.
She's the one who organized this wonderful
wedding.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
Please give a round of applause to my muse,
Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Me?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
The emotions I felt during races, the precious
time I spent with people I love... All those
sparkling days of joy came back to me today.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for putting together such a
wonderful and exciting wedding for me, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, at first, I didn't know how to
organize a wonderful wedding for you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I thought and thought about it, and my plan
got really wild!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But then, all the Muses reminded me of
something! I remembered what you said when you
asked me to help out.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
And you, my little muse, are always doing your
very best to make things exciting, and when I
looked at you, I had a thought.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
If you helped me, my wedding would definitely be
wonderful and one to remember!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
When you told me that, my first thought wasn't to
throw you a super grand party.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
All I wanted to do was give you and everyone else
an exciting time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to show you how fun and incredible
every day will still be for you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I tried to make sure your new start was super
full of fun and excitement! That's my present to
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking around the academy a few days after
the wedding when I spot Haru Urara reading a
letter with a grin on her face.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"So basically, every day is super exciting! I'm sure
lots more fun days are waiting for you in the
future too, Urara!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
"In the future"! I wonder what those days will be
like? Hmm, I don't really know...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But I sure hope that even when I'm an old lady,
years and yeeears in the future, I'll still be having
megatons of fun!
